stemHtml: For a VFR flight severe airframe icing may occur when flying…

options.a: between two cloud layers, without precipitation, resulting in clear ice formation
options.b: into freezing rain, resulting in clear ice formation
options.c: into supercooled rain, resulting in rime ice formation
options.d: into an area outside of clouds where the temperature is below 0°C, resulting in rime ice formation
